dagriculture 0.3.0

Structural diff of two graphs

Source: R/graph_boundary.R
dagri_graph_diff.Rd

Returns a pure structural diff with no workflow semantics: which node and edge ids were added or removed going from before to after. Nodes use names(graph$nodes); edges use dagri_edge_ids() so both named-map storage and unnamed edge lists with embedded ids are supported.

Usage

dagri_graph_diff(before, after)

Arguments

before

A dagri_graph (the prior state).

after

A dagri_graph (the new state).

Value

A list with added_nodes, removed_nodes, added_edges, and removed_edges (each a character vector).

Examples

reg <- dagri_registry(dagri_kind("source"), dagri_kind("fit"))
before <- dagri_graph(reg) |>
  dagri_add_node("data", "source") |>
  dagri_add_node("fit", "fit") |>
  dagri_add_edge("data", "fit", id = "e1")
after <- dagri_add_node(before, "diag", "fit")
diff <- dagri_graph_diff(before, after)
diff$added_nodes
#> [1] "diag"
